revision.text:
==English Content== {{Cat main}}
[[ar:Category:تصنيف:مشاعر معادية لبريطانيا]] [[ar:Category:مشاعر معادية لبريطانيا]] [[arwiki:Category:تصنيف:مشاعر معادية لبريطانيا]] [[be_x_old:Category:Катэгорыя:Антыбрытанскасьць]] [[category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[cy:Category:Categori:Teimladau gwrth-Brydeinig]] [[cy:Category:Teimladau gwrth-Brydeinig]] [[en:Category:Anti-British sentiment]] [[en:Category:Anti-British sentiment]] [[ja:Category:反英感情]] [[ja:Category:反英感情]] [[ko:Category:반영 감정]] [[ko:Category:분류:반영 감정]] [[mk:Category:Антибритански чувства]] [[mk:Category:Категорија:Антибритански чувства]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on :Category:Anglo-Satsuma_War]] [[sn:be_x_old:Category:Антыбрытанскасьць]] [[tr:Category:Britanyalı karşıtlığı]] [[tr:Category:Kategori:Britanyalı karşıtlığı]] [[ur:Category:زمرہ:مملکت متحدہ مخالف جذبات]] [[ur:Category:مملکت متحدہ مخالف جذبات]] [[vi:Category:Thể loại:Tâm lý bài Anh Quốc]] [[vi:Category:Tâm lý bài Anh Quốc]] [[zh:Category:Category:反英情緒]] [[zh:Category:反英情緒]]

Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

Text replacement - "{{wikidata link|" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata]]{{Wikidata link|"

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "[[Category:categories missing wikidata]]" to "[[Category:Categories in Categories missing wikidata but actually having wikidata but with jawiki]]"
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"

Text replacement - "[[Ja:" to "[[ja:"
